# CasinoScout

> Independent online casino reviews for Canadian players. Real money tested, licences verified, bonuses analysed.

CasinoScout.co provides expert casino reviews, bonus comparisons, and gambling guides for players in Canada. All casinos are tested with real deposits. Updated monthly.

## Pages

- [Homepage](https://casinoscout.co/): Top 7 online casinos Canada 2026 — ranked and tested
- [Best Online Casinos Canada](https://casinoscout.co/en/best-online-casinos-canada/): Full expert guide to Canadian online casinos
- [Ontario iGO Casinos](https://casinoscout.co/en/online-casinos-ontario/): iGaming Ontario licensed operators
- [Interac Casinos](https://casinoscout.co/en/interac-casinos-canada/): Casinos accepting Interac deposits and withdrawals
- [No Deposit Bonus Canada](https://casinoscout.co/en/no-deposit-bonus-canada/): Verified free spins and no-deposit offers
- [Fast Payout Casinos](https://casinoscout.co/en/fast-payout-casinos-canada/): Tested withdrawal speeds
- [Free Spins Canada](https://casinoscout.co/en/free-spins-canada/): Free spin bonuses for Canadian players
- [Wagering Calculator](https://casinoscout.co/tools/wagering-calculator/): Calculate bonus wagering costs
- [About CasinoScout](https://casinoscout.co/about/): Editorial policy and review methodology
